name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ GG Marmont Zip Wallet, Dear Alessandro Michele, every beloved design is connected to the House's past, and the Creative Director has brought it into the current collection. At the core of this precious collection, the GG Marmont is instantly recognized by its Double G monogram—appearing as matching resin hardware on the top of this wallet. Moiré lining, Double G, interior zip pocket, snap closure.
